Please enter your credentials to access your account.
auth.signUpDescription: Please provide your basic details to get started.
auth.profileDescription: Almost there! Complete your profile to join the LogiTrack team.
auth.termsAgreement: By clicking "Complete Registration", you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your account will be created and you're redirected to the dashboard.

landing.metaDescription: Orchestrate every shipment with live intelligence. Synchronize dispatch, fleets, and customer promises in one immersive dashboard.

hero.title: Orchestrate every shipment with live intelligence.
hero.description: Synchronize dispatch, fleets, and customer promises in one immersive dashboard. Forecast issues before they happen and keep routes optimized with predictive AI.

features.title: Everything you need for end-to-end visibility.
features.description: Coordinate dispatch, drivers, and customer updates with intelligent workflows designed for complex logistics operations.

smartRoute.title: Smart Route Planning
smartRoute.desc: Optimize deliveries with live traffic and warehouse capacity data to cut delays.

predictiveEta.title: Predictive ETAs
predictiveEta.desc: Accurately forecast arrival times with AI-powered scheduling models.

driverPerf.title: Driver Performance
driverPerf.desc: Track utilization, safety metrics, and compliance from a unified dashboard.

exceptionAlerts.title: Exception Alerts
exceptionAlerts.desc: React instantly to disruptions with automated notifications and workflows.

workflow.desc1: Integrate telematics, TMS, and WMS data sources in minutes with prebuilt connectors.
workflow.desc2: Monitor every shipment and asset in real time with adaptive dashboards and heatmaps.
workflow.desc3: Trigger proactive workflows, alerts, and customer updates before issues escalate.
workflow.desc4: Leverage AI-driven route optimization to minimize fuel costs, idle time, and delays.
workflow.desc5: Evaluate KPIs such as delivery accuracy, driver efficiency, and cost per shipment with analytics tools.
workflow.desc6: Expand your logistics network confidently with modular integrations and scalable infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your logistics operations?
cta.description: Partner with Logi-Track to unlock real-time visibility, predictive intelligence, and exceptional customer experiences.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for local fleet owners and individual operators.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Optimized for regional logistics and growing teams.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom solutions for global supply chain leaders.

infrastructure.title: Enterprise-Grade Security & Performance
infrastructure.description: Need more than 10,000 routes per month? Our Global infrastructure handles millions of telemetry events per second with 99.99% uptime. Contact our engineering team for custom integration solutions and volume-based pricing.

footer.tos: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All plans subject to our TOS.
footer.support: Enterprise customers get dedicated support channels.

featuresPage.heroSubtitle: From predictive telemetry to autonomous warehouse orchestration, explore the tools redefining what it means to be a global logistics leader.

routeOptimization.title: AI Route Optimization
routeOptimization.description: Our proprietary AI engine processes live traffic, weather, and fleet capacity to generate the most fuel-efficient routes in real-time.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Intelligence
warehouse.description: Optimize pick-paths and vertical space utilization with automated WMS synchronization. Scale from 1 to 100 warehouses with ease.

telemetry.title: Real-Time Telemetry
telemetry.description: Monitor vehicle health, driver safety, and fuel consumption via integrated telematics. Convert raw data into actionable insights.

alerts.title: Smart Exception Alerts
alerts.description: Stop reacting to disasters. Our anomaly detection system flags potential delays before they happen, suggesting proactive rerouting.

compliance.title: Enterprise Compliance
compliance.description: Automatic audit logs, geofencing, and chain-of-custody tracking. Built to meet the strictest logistics security standards.

api.title: API-First Architecture
api.description: Integrate with SAP, Oracle, or custom legacy systems in hours, not weeks, using our robust SDK and webhook infrastructure.

infrastructure.title: One Dashboard. Infinite Control.
infrastructure.description: Our features aren't standalone tools—they are part of a deeply integrated ecosystem. When your warehouse updates, your fleet reacts. When traffic spikes, your customer knows. That is the Logi-Track advantage.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.
footer.builtFor: Built for the enterprise, optimized for the road.

mission.title: Orchestrating the Future of Global Trade.
mission.subtitle: At LogiTrack, we don’t just track shipments—we synchronize entire supply chains. Our mission is to transform fragmented logistics data into live intelligence.

vision.title: Eliminating the blind spots in modern logistics.
vision.description: Born from the intersection of AI innovation and operational expertise, LogiTrack was built to solve the most complex challenges in freight and warehouse management. We envision a world where every vehicle, warehouse, and shipment is part of a unified, self-optimizing ecosystem.

resilience.title: Predictive Resilience
resilience.description: We anticipate disruptions before they escalate. Our AI models analyze live traffic and capacity to keep your SLA at 98%+.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: Empowering every stakeholder with a single source of truth. From the driver’s cab to the C-suite, total visibility is standard.

efficiency.title: Scalable Efficiency
efficiency.description: Built to grow with your network. Whether managing a local fleet or a global supply chain, our infrastructure scales seamlessly.

why.title: Why We Do It
why.subtitle: In an era of instant expectations, logistics is no longer a back-office function—it is a competitive advantage. LogiTrack provides the tools to turn that advantage into a market-leading reality.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.

hero.title: How LogiTrack Works
hero.subtitle: A comprehensive, end-to-end logistics orchestration platform designed to scale with your business needs.

cta.title: Ready to Optimize?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of companies that have modernized their logistics with LogiTrack.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.
footer.builtFor: Built for the enterprise, optimized for the road.

vehicles.title: Vehicle Fleet Management
vehicles.subtitle: Track, manage and optimize your logistics fleet in real-time.

dialogs.alertsDesc: Notify fleet managers 30 days before documents expire.
dialogs.noGpsDesc: Location will appear here once the vehicle starts transmitting GPS data.
dialogs.dbFallback: Showing last known DB position — live signal not yet active
dialogs.noSupplementalDetails: No supplemental details provided for this issue.
dialogs.tellUsMore: Tell us more about the situation...
dialogs.maintenanceDetailsDesc: View and manage the status of this maintenance entry.
dialogs.addMaintenanceDesc: Log service and maintenance events for this vehicle.
dialogs.uploadDocumentDesc: Add new compliance or service records to this vehicle.

vehicles.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this vehicle? This will permanently remove the vehicle and all associated data.

drivers.subtitle: Manage your fleet drivers, monitor performance and license status.
drivers.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this driver? This action cannot be undone.

labels.noDocsDesc: This driver does not have any official documents registered in the system.
labels.noActivities: No activities found for this driver.
labels.reviewAssignment: Please review your assignments before saving.
labels.verificationDesc: All data is subject to verification.
labels.ensureVisible: Please ensure all data is clearly visible.

dialogs.editSubtitle: Update driver information, license details and assignments

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.subtitle: Manage, track, and analyze inventory items efficiently

dialogs.intelDesc: Real-time stock monitoring is active. Re-stock workflows will trigger when quantity drops below {minStock} units.
dialogs.auditWarning: Manual stock adjustments are tracked in the audit log and affect shipment dispatch availability.
dialogs.storageDesc: Define where this inventory will be stored and its stock thresholds.
dialogs.putawayDesc: This transaction is categorized as PUTAWAY. The initial stock will be immediately registered to the selected warehouse and logged in the Prisma ledger.
dialogs.detailsDesc: Provide the fundamental identification details for the new inventory item.

inventory.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

company.title: Company
company.overview: Overview of your organisation, resources, and team members.

deleteDialog.title: Remove Member?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the company? This will revoke their access immediately.

dialogs.addMemberSubtitle: Invite a new member to your organization and assign a role
dialogs.identitySubtitle: Configure your organization's core profile and presence
dialogs.invitationNote: Members will receive an invitation to join your company infrastructure.

steps.regionalDesc: Configure how your team interacts with time, local commerce, and data visibility.
steps.standardize: These presets automatically standardize all operational units. Sub-entities (warehouses, fleets) can still override these individually when needed.

dialogs.localizationDesc: Platform localization affects how currencies, timestamps, and numbers are rendered globally across your dashboard and reports.

branding.title: Brand Persona
branding.subtitle: Define how your organization appears across the LogiTrack ecosystem.
branding.legalNameDesc: This will be your primary identifier for billing and administrative tasks.
branding.uploadFormat: PNG, JPG or SVG. Max size 5MB.

memberDetails.title: Member Details
memberDetails.adminDataDesc: User access is managed by the organization administrator. This member currently has {role} permissions within the LogiTrack platform.

shipments.subtitle: Manage your shipments, monitor performance and status.

routes.subtitle: Optimize and manage your fleet's active delivery paths.

dialogs.addSubtitle: Define timing, endpoints and assets for this route
dialogs.editSubtitle: Modify route parameters and update logistics status
dialogs.basicDetailsDesc: These details help define the framework and priority of the route.
dialogs.chooseShipment: Choose a shipment to pre-fill locations...
dialogs.prefillNote: Selecting a shipment will automatically fill the Route Name and Destination.
dialogs.timingGuidance: Setting accurate start and end times helps the system calculate delivery windows and optimize fuel efficiency during the route planning phase.
dialogs.locationDetailsDesc: Enter the starting point and destination to calculate the route metrics.
dialogs.optimizationDesc: This route currently avoids major highways. You can adjust the path by dragging the line on the map to avoid traffic or congested areas.
dialogs.assignmentsDesc: Assign an available driver and vehicle to this route.
